risk_title: Political and Governance Risk - Engagement with Interim Taliban Authority
risk_summary: Project implementation depends on coordination with the interim Taliban authority (ITA) Ministry of Rural Rehabilitation and Development (MRRD). The document indicates both implementing agencies have agreed with the ITA on geographical coverage and project activities, but this represents a governance fragility risk given the Taliban's interim status and international non-recognition.
evidence_quote: Both implementing agencies have agreed with the interim Taliban authority (ITA) Ministry of Rural Rehabilitation and Development (MRRD) on geographical coverage and project activities.

risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Rating Remains High
risk_summary: The Political and Governance risk category has been rated 'High' consistently across all review periods (Approval, Last Approved Rating, and Proposed Rating), indicating persistent governance fragility concerns affecting the project.
evidence_quote: Risk Category: Political and Governance - Rating at Approval: High, Last Approved Rating: High, Proposed Rating: High

risk_title: Security and Access Constraints Affecting Water Quality Monitoring
risk_summary: The project acknowledges security and access concerns as factors limiting water quality assurance targets. The water quality compliance target is set at 80 percent rather than higher levels specifically to account for security-related constraints.
evidence_quote: The target is set at 80 percent of the value to take into account concerns regarding security, access, and the quality of existing water sources.
